examples.title: Fleet Health Check
examples.description: Poll all nodes to ensure the fleet is ready for a mission.
examples.user_input: Is the fleet ready for action?
examples.expected_output: Detailed JSON report of all 13 core nodes and their current health status.

examples.title: Trigger Maintenance Mission
examples.description: Orchestrate a cleanup of logs and backups across the infrastructure nodes.
examples.expected_output: Sequence of results showing space reclaimed across the sys-admin nodes.
